name: Enterprise Cloud Welcome Pack
subject: 🚀 Welcome to Next-Gen Cloud Platform, {{name}}!
content:
Hello {{name}},

Thank you for choosing our Enterprise suite. Your billing tier has been successfully initialized. Access your developer dashboard here:

https://enterprise.io/dev-portal

If you have any questions, our support engineers are standing by.

Cheers,
SaaS Support

name: Holiday Promotional Clearance
subject: 🎁 Special Festival Offer: Save 25% on annual developer billing
content:

name: Onboarding Verification Assistant
subject: WhatsApp Template
content: Hey {{name}}! Welcome aboard. Let's schedule your 10-minute master API integration walkthrough. Tap a button below to block our calendar! 📆

name: High Urgency Account Recovery OTP
subject: SMS Template
content: SaaS SECURITY: Your authentication code is {{otp_code}}. It is valid for exactly {{minutes}} minutes. Do not share this with anyone.
